seo.title: Products & Projects — John Doe | Bootstrapped B2B studio
seo.description: Five long-horizon products: PixelDocket design intelligence feeds, PromptHarbor LLM edge, VantageFence traffic integrity, Alto CRM, and StratusSearch catalog search.
seo.keywords: PixelDocket, PromptHarbor, VantageFence, Alto CRM, StratusSearch, design data feeds, LLM API gateway, cloud SaaS, traffic integrity, Elasticsearch, bootstrapped studio

hero.title: Products & projects
hero.description: Each line item is a live product with paying customers — not a pitch deck placeholder.

projects.name: VantageFence
projects.summary: Invalid click and bot-pattern analysis for paid acquisition teams.
projects.description: Combines session signals, ASN reputation, and lightweight ML scoring to flag suspicious traffic before it burns budget. Funded in part by an $800K non-dilutive R&D award focused on cloud-native detection pipelines.

projects.name: PixelDocket
projects.summary: Structured feeds of public catalog and component benchmarks for agencies.
projects.tagline: Design intelligence as a data product
projects.description: Collects and normalizes publicly listed UI patterns, component pricing, and commerce catalog snapshots for digital agencies and in-house brand teams. Peak segment ARR around $240K with diversified SMB accounts.

projects.name: Alto CRM
projects.summary: Opinionated CRM for studios juggling retainers and sprints.
projects.description: Contacts, lightweight pipelines, and time tracking tuned for services businesses. Offered free for early community members while core billing ships.

projects.name: StratusSearch
projects.summary: Elasticsearch-backed search for large merchandise catalogs.
projects.description: Full-text and faceted search microservice used by mid-market retailers and PixelDocket customers who need shopper-grade discovery without running their own search SRE bench.

projects.name: PromptHarbor
projects.summary: Managed LLM routing, quotas, and offline evaluation hooks.
projects.description: Provides org-level keys, per-workspace budgets, red-team prompts, and exportable eval sets so product teams can ship assistants without wiring every provider by hand.

intro.description: Open tooling and commercial software shaped by on-call reality: observable, documented, and boring where possible.
